commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real Android tap-through proof for a draft external PR, not a narrow code repair automation can supply.; Cleared: The diff only changes Android UI markdown link metadata plus a unit test, with no dependency, workflow, secret, auth, permission, or gateway changes. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Android ChatMarkdown link rendering to emit Compose LinkAnnotation.Url metadata and adds unit tests for bare URLs, markdown links, and plain text.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main parses bare URLs as CommonMark links and renders them through ChatMarkdown, but Link nodes only receive SpanStyle without URL metadata or tap handling. I did not run a device or emulator tap-through in this read-only review.
